meta.phase-name: Supabase Delivery Contract + Encrypted Env Bundle Workflow

phase-plan.purpose: Define and implement the first production-ready cross-repo delivery/security slice for Unreal DLC: Supabase/S3 distribution contracts and encrypted env bundle tooling for docs-site and plugin operations.
phase-plan.scope: In scope: delivery contract definition (bucket layout, manifest index, versioning, signed URL policy), encrypted env bundle CLI for cross-repo secrets transfer, loop-tracked task updates. Out of scope: full publish/pull API runtime implementation and Unreal runtime loader wiring.

file.description: Track 52-02 execution and follow-up 52-03 implementation task.
Set active plan to 52-02 and update next-action context.
CLI to seal/unseal env files into encrypted bundle artifacts for cross-repo workflows.
Ignore decrypted secret outputs and local sealed bundle test artifacts.
Role-based end-to-end delivery workflow documentation across authoring, distribution, and Unreal ingestion.

task.description: Define Supabase/S3 pack object layout, manifest index contract, and signed URL delivery policy for Unreal plugin consumers.
Implement encrypted env bundle CLI with deterministic bundle metadata and explicit key input policy.
Document requirement updates and proposed acceptance criteria for phase 52 delivery/security.
Define hybrid storage decision: Supabase/S3 as distribution system of record, Dolt as optional local/authoring patch-history source feeding bundle generation.

questions.question: Use one bucket with namespaced prefixes (`packs/`, `manifests/`, `reports/`) or dedicated buckets per artifact class?
Default signed URL TTL for plugin downloads: short-lived (5-15m) vs medium-lived (1h) with refresh flow?
Should env bundle key live only in local shell + CI secret store, or also in an internal password manager with rotation cadence?
Should Unreal plugin/runtime ever depend on Dolt directly, or remain fully decoupled with Dolt only on authoring/build side?

decision.summary: Introduce repository-local encrypted env bundle tooling now, before full publish API work, to remove secret handling ambiguity across docs-site and plugin repos.
decision.impact: Creates repeatable, auditable secret transfer workflow and reduces plaintext-env drift while phase 52 delivery APIs are being implemented.

decision.summary: Adopt hybrid model: Supabase/S3 is the downloadable artifact distribution channel; Dolt remains an optional authoring/build-time patch source used by ingest pipelines, not a runtime dependency for plugin downloads.
decision.impact: Preserves existing Dolt workflow value while keeping runtime delivery simpler and production-ready through signed object storage contracts.

decision.summary: Keep phase 52 focused on runtime delivery contracts and move Dolt governance/deep workflow design to a dedicated follow-on phase (53).
decision.impact: Protects delivery velocity while still capturing a clear path for lineage governance and promotion policy hardening.

suggestion.gap: No explicit requirement currently defines Supabase object layout and version indexing for downloadable content packs.
suggestion.proposal: Add a requirement for immutable pack version index + latest pointer semantics + signed URL retrieval policy.

suggestion.gap: Secret handling is documented at policy level but not backed by a required automation workflow.
suggestion.proposal: Add a requirement that cross-repo env transfer must use encrypted serialized bundle artifacts with CI-managed decryption keys and rotation runbook.
